action.reasoning: Observation: the DataParallel-from-pretrained 6-epoch run collapsed badly (val worst 0.054, hidden worst 0.147), while the original checkpoints/best.pt remains the best valid submitted model at 0.4589. Analysis: the collapse likely came from an overly aggressive fresh fine-tune or training bug; the safest improvement attempt is conservative continuation from the known-good baseline, with initial validation/checkpoint copy so the submitted checkpoint cannot be worse by val selection if training hurts. Decision: add a separate conservative DataParallel continuation trainer that loads checkpoints/best.pt, evaluates/saves it first, fine-tunes only 2 epochs with very small LR and standard CE, selects by OOD val worst-region, then submit the selected checkpoint.
